data.content: Implementation review approved. Component meets all requirements: Expected/Actual Outcome form with validation, Debug submit button with loading state, embedded xterm.js terminal with SSE via connectToSession, and reuses terminal-panel.tsx patterns (dynamic xterm import, FitAddon, CSS injection, disposed guard, event handling). Error handling for startSession failures properly addressed per prior feedback — launchHistoryDebugSession wraps errors into BdResult, handleSubmit uses try/catch/finally. Tests cover validation, prompt builder, SSR rendering, and error recovery. No security issues or regressions.
